items.title:
R to @drawthingsapp: 👨‍🎨 This LoRA is from @fal, Given a person image and clothing reference images, generates a realistic result of the person wearing the specified outfit.

🔗 LoRA link: https://huggingface.co/fal/flux-klein-9b-virtual-tryon-lora
items.description:
👨‍🎨 This LoRA is from @fal, Given a person image and clothing reference images, generates a realistic result of the person wearing the specified outfit.

🔗 LoRA link: huggingface.co/fal/flux-klei…

items.title:
👕 Using Flux.2 Klein 9B for Virtual Try-On in Draw Things.

📊 Below is a comparison test in DT showing results with and without LoRA.

✨ The results with LoRA are slightly better, though it adds a subtle yellowish tone to the image.

🖱️ The process involves placing the original image on the canvas, then dragging the top and pants onto the Moodboard in sequence.

💬 You can find information about this LoRA in the comments section.
